title: F1 Race Standings Web Application

steps.description: Define domain entities and value objects for F1 data (Driver, Team, Race, Season, Championship)
steps.done_condition: All entities and value objects defined with proper validation

steps.description: Define port interfaces for data access (DriverRepository, TeamRepository, RaceRepository)
steps.done_condition: All port interfaces implemented with TypeScript interfaces

steps.description: Implement secondary adapter for F1 API data fetching (HTTP client for F1 API)
steps.done_condition: API client successfully fetches and parses F1 data

steps.description: Implement primary adapter for React frontend (REST client for F1 data)
steps.done_condition: React client successfully consumes F1 data from ports

steps.description: Implement use case for fetching live driver standings
steps.done_condition: Use case successfully retrieves and formats live standings

steps.description: Implement use case for race results by round
steps.done_condition: Use case successfully retrieves and formats race results

steps.description: Implement use case for constructor championship table
steps.done_condition: Use case successfully retrieves and formats constructor data

steps.description: Implement use case for driver profiles with stats
steps.done_condition: Use case successfully retrieves and formats driver profiles

steps.description: Implement use case for historical season data
steps.done_condition: Use case successfully retrieves and formats historical data

steps.description: Implement composition root for React app (wiring adapters to ports)
steps.done_condition: Composition root successfully initializes all ports and adapters

steps.description: Implement integration tests for F1 data flow (end-to-end validation)
steps.done_condition: All integration tests pass with mock F1 API

riskRegister.mitigation: Implement caching layer in secondary adapter
Use Redux Toolkit for global state

successCriteria: All F1 data endpoints successfully integrated
React frontend renders all race standings components
